Name: Call for a Parade
Description: Oh there's a parade soon, how nice!

Name: Coin
Description: Its like the coin I have but..bigger, flatter?

Name: Lawnmower
Description: Can't use this to mow my lawn, if you know what I mean.

Name: Magnet
Description: Pretty strong magnet.

Name: Free Bird Seed
Description: Hope I didn't pay for this!

Name: Bone
Description: Did a Ghost Castle skeleton drop this?

Name: Pep
Description: Oh that's a good boy, what a good bo- aaand he's gone.

Name: Balloon
Description: Definitely not a magic balloon.

Name: Horn
Description: Woah, that's loud!

Name: Radio
Description: The only channel is 'Car Town' radio.  What is this?

Name: Grocery Bags
Description: Filled with oil, gas, wiper fluid...weird.

Name: Invitation to the Fireworks Factory
Description: Might be a fun trip, but its for someone named 'Putt-Putt', not me.

Name: Picture of the Moon
Description: I guess someone liked it enough.

Name: Spaceship Steering Wheel
Description: Its like a steering wheel, but big.

Name: Rocket Cone
Description: This thing's bigger than a house!

Name: 5 Moon Crystals
Description: Wow these seem super valuable.  And shiny.

Name: Rocket Ship Key
Description: Says 'If lost return to the moon'.  What?

Name: Wrong Ship Key
Description: Isn't this just the key to someone's house?

Name: Rocket Fuel Voucher
Description: Could exchange for rocket fuel, but why?

Name: Robbie Radar's Rocket Fuel
Description: Wow this could fuel a...a...I don't know!

Name: Zoo Chow
Description: A bag of food for some sort of exotic animal.

Name: Hot Cocoa
Description: Ooh get me a blankie and I could drink this all night!

Name: Cheese Squigglies
Description: Could be a tasty snack!

Name: Camera
Description: Maybe the Goblin Businessman would like this?

Name: Rope
Description: Could replace the rope Beatrice broke that one time!

Name: Huge Log
Description: Wow its huge!  And a log!

Name: Shovel
Description: Some gardener's tool?  Who does that nearby?

Name: Toolbox
Description: Has a lot seemingly useful things in there!

Name: Cotton Candy
Description: I haven't had this since I was a kid!

Name: Mr. Firebird's Timerift
Description: Maybe I could stop Chaos Witch before sh- nah, boring.

Name: Putt-Putt's History Report
Description: Eh, I'd give it a B+ maybe.

Name: A Nickel
Description: Yep, its a nickel.  Wait what's a nickel?

Name: A Rock in the Shape of a 2D Mathematical Object
Description: Woah its shaped like a...I didn't take that math class!

Name: Wheel's Bowl
Description: Pretty normal bowl.  Eh.

Name: A Pile of Hay
Description: What is this, a farm?

Name: Toby's Oil Can
Description: I got better lube at home, honestly.

Name: Chewy Fruity Wagon Wheel
Description: Yummy!

Name: Old West Newspaper
Description: Geez this thing's OLD.

Name: Smokey the Firetruck Lunchbox
Description: What a cute little box.  What kid dropped this?

Name: Balloon Maker
Description: Useful for a birthday party I guess.

Name: Blacksmith's Firewood
Description: Could make a nice fire.

Name: Panned Keys
Description: They're kinda muddy and gross.  Eugh.

Name: Medieval Armor
Description: Waaay too heavy for me.

Name: Putt-Putt's Calculator
Description: Huh.  2-8-0-8, aaand.  Hah!  I have those!

Name: Batteries
Description: Charged and ready to go!

Name: Wire Cutters
Description: Pretty strong cutters!

Name: Rare Mineral from Rock Mines
Description: A diamond maybe?

Name: Merlin's Package
Description: Says 'Return to Merlin'.  I think Beatrice knows them.

Name: Dragon Food
Description: Well I'm not feeding them.

Name: Merlin's Abacus
Description: Pretty fancy, much better than mine!

Name: Gold Bar
Description: This thing's heavy!

Name: Invitation to the Cartown 500
Description: Wow, a race!  But what's a car?

Name: Hi-Powered Hi-Octane Gasoline
Description: Eugh, smelling this makes me feel real loopy...

Name: Super Speed Radial Racing Tires
Description: Wow, even more bouncey than a honey block!

Name: Safety Helmet
Description: Always wear protection folks!

Name: Triangular Racing Flag
Description: What a cute little flag!

Name: Empty Bottle
Description: So handy!

Name: Produce Box
Description: Just some empty box.  Eh.

Name: Flashlight
Description: Now I can see in the dark!  Wait there's no dark area in this game.

Name: Torval Farm Produce
Description: Filled with fresh produce, yummy!

Name: Hook
Description: But where's the line and the sinker?

Name: Milkshake
Description: Oh is this a sample of Belle's Milkshake?  No just a normal one...

Name: Milk
Description: Just milk from a cow.  I mean like, a normal cow.

Name: Brick
Description: A cop might like it.

Name: Tire Patch Kit
Description: If I knew what a tire was I'd know what this was for.

Name: Mrs. Airbag's Hubcaps
Description: Wow!  The Maiden Shield of Balley Seven!  Or shields.

Name: Empty Gas Can
Description: What would you fill it with though?

Name: Ladder
Description: A step ladder!  Maybe a bit bigger.

Name: Ticket to the Circus
Description: What am I a clown now?

Name: Beautiful Flowers
Description: So pretty!

Name: Magnifying Glass
Description: Now I can see very tiny things!

Name: Cop's Bureaucratic Paperwork
Description: No way in hell am I filling this out.

Name: Jumbo Bag of Peanuts
Description: Oh I love peanuts!  Oh, wrong word.

Name: Swimsuit
Description: Wouldn't fit, seems like its for someone very heavy set.

Name: Piece of a Recipe
Description: I can't really make out what it makes...

Name: Safety Net
Description: Always...hang protection?  Bit doesn't work...'

Name: Saw
Description: Now I can...be a carpenter on the side, i guess?

Name: Pectoro's Secret Shake
Description: Yummy and full of important vitamins and minerals!

Name: Big Umbrella
Description: Could cover me and Beatrice during a rainstorm!

Name: Honkish Translation Book
Description: Apparently 'honk' means anything apparently.

Name: Honko the Clown's Nose
Description: No I'm not putting it on for you.

Name: Trampoline
Description: Now I can jump really high!  In one place!

Name: Plans for Katie Cannonball's Act
Description: Who would shoot themselves out of a cannon?  Crazy.

Name: Small Umbrella
Description: What is this, an umbrella for ants?

Name: Pool Patch
Description: Would get rid of those pesky weird shaped holes!

Name: Regal Clothes
Description: So dignified!

Name: The Satisfaction of Playing Putt-Putt
Description: Ahhh, so satisfying!
